steps.name: security-foundation
steps.summary: Spring Security + jjwt 0.12 + JwtProvider(secret 길이 검증, Clock 주입) + JwtAuthFilter(access type만, /actuator skip) + SecurityConfig(STATELESS, permitAll, JwtAuthFilter 등록) + ErrorCode 5종 추가

steps.name: signup-login
steps.summary: User 엔티티(@Setter 없음) + Flyway V2 + BCrypt 10 + AuthService(signup/login, INVALID_CREDENTIALS 통일) + AuthController(POST /auth/signup·login) + JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint(401 ApiResponse) + 한글 username 허용
